name: backend
description: Design of a Collaborative, Intelligent and Secure Environment for Remote Programming Labs

scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
scripts.test:integration: cross-env MONGODB_URI_TEST=mongodb://127.0.0.1:27017/tp_projets_integration INTEGRATION_TEST_MOCK_GITHUB=true INTEGRATION_TEST_MOCK_SANDBOX=true INTEGRATION_TEST_MOCK_OLLAMA=true JWT_SECRET=test_integration_secret node --test ./tests/integration/*.test.mjs
scripts.test:integration:memory: cross-env INTEGRATION_USE_MEMORY_MONGO=true INTEGRATION_TEST_MOCK_GITHUB=true INTEGRATION_TEST_MOCK_SANDBOX=true JWT_SECRET=test_integration_secret node --test ./tests/integration/*.test.mjs
